title: TSE updates
subtitle: Zero-downtime catalog and policy updates for TSE operations. Diagnostic only — not fiscal firmware flashing.
diagnosticNote: Updates roll catalog/policy versions without interrupting signing when a healthy backup is available for medium/high risk packs.
updatesAvailableDesc: There are new updates available for your TSE devices. No downtime required for low-risk packs.
upToDateDesc: All TSE catalog versions match the current Super Admin target.
emptySelect: Select a tenant to check TSE updates.
forbidden: You do not have permission to view this page.
zeroDowntimeWarn: Healthy backup recommended for medium/high risk updates
